---
title: "People"
description: "Important people and relationships"
---

# Key People

- Fernando Arriaga: Co-Founder and CEO — GitHub handle: `fernandoarriagau`
- Williams Verde: Co-Founder and CTO - GitHub handle: `sparkiq-git`
- Diego Olalde: Co-Founder and doing tech stuff — GitHub: `dolalde-sparkiq`

# Agent Handles

- Dev agent GitHub handle: `TODO: add dev agent GitHub username`
- Code review agent GitHub handle: `TODO: add code review agent GitHub username`
